design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed=hash('Super for recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews|niche_landing|recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews|2026-07-06T16:47:21.845370+00:00') → hero_architecture=workflow-command-center, typography=Cabinet Grotesk, components=[workflow-playbook-timeline, source-card-dossier, implementation-checklist], GSAP paradigms=[pinned-chapter-scroll, hover-physics]. AIDA Check: Attention(hero with recruiter workflow promise), Interest(market proof + competitors), Desire(workflow + cache reuse), Action(CTA bands). Font Selection: Cabinet Grotesk from Fontshare. Hero Math Verification: max-width headline clamp ensures 2–3 lines on desktop. Bento Density Verification: grid-auto-flow:dense present. GSAP Motion Selection: guarded GSAP with ScrollTrigger. Label Sweep & Button Check: all CTAs point to https://app.getsupers.com/general?login=1&open_login=1 with black/white contrast.
headline: Super for recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews

site_brief.audience: recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work. Include a long-form field guide for this niche with concrete workflows, how-to steps, role-specific examples, objections, and a setup checklist.
queries: recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews AI assistant
recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews

summary: A conversion-focused niche landing page showing how recruiters use Super as a personal AI agent to source candidates, operate real recruiting tools, and coordinate interviews faster using a reusable computer-use cache.
